title: Domain 4: Design Cost-Optimized Architectures (20%)
description: Pick the right pricing models for compute, cut storage and data-transfer cost, and use the tools that track and control spend.

lessons.title: Compute Pricing Models
objectives: Match On-Demand, Reserved, Savings Plans, and Spot to usage patterns
Combine pricing models across one workload
Use serverless to avoid paying for idle capacity

lessons.title: Storage and Data Transfer Cost
objectives: Match S3 storage classes to how often data is accessed
Automate savings with S3 Lifecycle rules

lessons.title: Cost Management and Governance Tools
objectives: Pick the right tool: Cost Explorer, Budgets, or the Cost and Usage Report
Attribute spend with cost allocation tags
Surface waste with Trusted Advisor and Compute Optimizer
